meta.description: Sustainability education for children and youth in Colombia.

home.heroTagline: Building a new story for Earth
home.pillar1Text: We work for a generation of children and youth committed to the planet.
home.pillar2Text: We create learning spaces to shift human activity toward sustainability.
home.pillar3Text: We connect people, communities, and organizations to strengthen action for planetary care.
home.programsTitle: Young people and children changing the planet
home.programsLead: Programs that help new generations become a positive force in how humanity relates to the planet.
home.card1Text: Spaces to reflect on today’s human–planet relationships and the need for change.
home.card2Text: Participation in spaces that empower youth to lead community change toward a sustainable future.
home.card3Text: Strengthening young people’s leadership in national and international public policy spaces.
home.serInspireText: Empowering people—especially children and youth across Colombia—to be agents of change in building a new relationship between humanity and the planet.
home.serGoalText: A Colombia where nature and biodiversity are integral to every person’s identity and wellbeing—and where young people lead a harmonious relationship between society and the planet.

about.heroQuote: We are a group of people committed to new generations—amplifying and fostering action around planetary sustainability.
about.directorCred: ANTHROPOLOGIST · MASTER’S IN ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT · UNIVERSITY OF THE ANDES
about.directorP1: With more than 18 years supporting environmental projects in Bogotá and other regions of Colombia, she has accompanied initiatives that connect citizens, institutions, and territories.
about.directorP2: She has worked with Grupo Semana and Semana Sostenible, organizing spaces that put children and youth at the center of conversations about sustainability.
about.directorP3: She founded Fundación Soy Planeta to strengthen new generations as guardians of the planet and to enable concrete community-led action.
about.inspireText: Empowering people—especially children and youth across Colombia—to be agents of change in building a new relationship between humanity and the planet.
about.goalText: A Colombia where nature and biodiversity are integral to every person’s identity and wellbeing—and where young people lead a harmonious relationship between society and the planet.
about.inspireShort: Empower children and youth across the country to become planetary beings and agents of change for sustainability.
about.goalShort: Position Colombia’s children and youth as global leaders in protecting and caring for the planet through sustainability awareness and practice.
about.voiceTitle: Amplifying the voices of new generations

about.commitText: We are committed to sustainability and positive change through the power of children and youth—to ensure a better future for everyone.
about.contactBlockText: Reach out by email or social media.

projects.ecoSub: The new generations’ challenge for the 2030 Agenda
projects.conectaText: We transform traditional career guidance into building a sustainable life project.
projects.genText: Second summit and national spaces connecting youth voices for the planet.
projects.mareaText: First Children’s Summit on Marine Ecosystems: ocean literacy and climate action starting in childhood.
